title: README claims rand::RngCore impl that does not exist
description: wolftpm/README.md line 46 lists 'Expose wolfTPM2_GetRandom as a rand::RngCore implementation' as a feature the crate provides. No such impl exists anywhere in the codebase. Users who read the README will expect RngCore compatibility and be surprised when it is absent. This is a documentation correctness bug — the public README is the contract.
